## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `python -m twine check dist/*`
- [ ] Homebrew formula tested, if packaging changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I avoided committing generated artifacts.
- [ ] I checked that this change keeps default installs lightweight.
